title: Ubiquiti U6-IW - UniFi6 In-Wall
description: U6-IW is a MU-MIMO WiFi 6 access point from the UniFi family, which is designed to be built into a data box on the wall. The wireless part is Dual Band, in the 5 GHz band it supports 4x4 MU-MIMO with a maximum modulation speed of 4804 Mbps and in of the 2.4 GHz band, it is 2x2 MIMO with a modulation speed of 574 Mbps . Power supply is 802.3af/at or passive PoE 44 to 57 V DC . In the case of using the PoE passthrough function, the maximum power on the output port is 15.4 W. The device is… In addition to the incoming Gigabit port on the back, it also has another 4 Gigabit ports on the bottom, where the PoE passthough function can be used on the first of these ports Supported by UniFi Network version 6.4.52 and later For the device, you need to download the original software called UniFi controller from the official website, thanks to which the entire network can be controlled. The indisputable advantage of the UniFi controller is that it is completely free without any restrictions ! This central management will allow you to upload maps and set basic parameters such as SSID, guest account, start page, traffic statistics and the list and status of associated clients always easily and quickly Zero Handoff Roaming - uninterrupted transition between individual APs Wireless uplink (suitable where it is impossible to get a data cable) Up to 8 SSIDs Detailed traffic statistics Guest network Voucher system Load balance - maintaining an even load/switching clients Speed limiting for each SSID Device Pad for attaching to the wall Screws
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 GHz (dual band) WiFi standards 802.11ax, 802.11ac, 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11b/g MU-MIMO Yes Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 4804 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 574 Tx power 2.4GHz [dBm] 22 Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 26 Security WPA, WPA2, WPA3 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 4 x 4 Type of antenna Built-in Internal antennas 4 Roaming Yes Antenna gain [dBi] 5, 6 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (5) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af, 802.3at, 44 .. 57V DC PoE type PoE-Out + PoE-In Max. power consumption [W] 13,5 Physical characteristics Purpose Indoor Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 30 up to 60 Weight [g] 460 Width [mm] 96 Height [mm] 140 Depth [mm] 31
